description: Canonical-home rules for dev-process artifacts (D-canonical-memory-consolidation-2026-06-23). The path-moves monitor (devlab/claudecode/path_moves_monitor.py) runs this against the git file index at day-close and raises a system alarm for any artifact found under a retired path or outside the canonical home — so a renamed store with a surviving write-path can never again silently split the source of truth.
